completed_tasks.notes: export-louvain-graph subcommand; download_raw() for Send-safe ar5iv fallback; run_community_detection() in analyze pipeline.

completed_tasks.name: A2: Toy fixture — prototypes/data/hopfield_spinglass_toy.json
completed_tasks.notes: 2 communities (Hopfield/neural vs SK spin-glass), 12 terms each, shared {spin,ising} edge stalk, 1 inter-community edge, ground_truth={bridge_community_pair:[0,1]}.

completed_tasks.name: A3+A4+A5: sheaf_lbd_v01.py + T1/SC1-SC3 + notebook
completed_tasks.notes: T1 PASS (Φ=2.0, ground truth top-1). SC2 ratio=0.0. SC3 min_lam=2.0. H⁰=22 on toy (expected — dense eigh used for N≤500, not eigsh). SHEAF_V01_RESULTS.md shows HOLD pending corpus.

remaining_tasks.name: B1: Analyze Feynman corpus
remaining_tasks.notes: cargo run --bin resyn -- analyze --db surrealkv://./data-kuramoto. BLOCKED: crawl must finish first. Check: tail data-kuramoto/crawl.log. Crawl last seen running with 429 rate limits (unauthenticated S2 API).

remaining_tasks.name: B3+B4: T2 + T4 + SC4 + SC5 + n_sections sensitivity {10,20,50}
remaining_tasks.notes: Re-run: uv run --with numpy --with scipy --with matplotlib --with networkx python prototypes/sheaf_lbd_v01.py. Auto-detects corpus at prototypes/data/research_synergy_pre2015.json. T2: precision@10 >= 0.4 (ceiling 0.5 — 5 evaluable pairs). T4: top-5 ablation ratios > 3. SC4: spectral gap >= 1.1. SC5: Jaccard <= 0.8.

remaining_tasks.name: B5: Finalize results + figures
remaining_tasks.notes: AUTHORIZE if T1+T2>=0.4+T4>=50%. STANDALONE if T4>=50% but T2<0.4. FALSIFIED if T4<20% or SC5>0.8. HOLD otherwise. Figures generated automatically by sheaf_lbd_v01.py if matplotlib+networkx present.

remaining_tasks.name: Vault updates post-verdict
remaining_tasks.notes: wiki/meta/agentic-experiments.md EXP-RS-07 row; wiki/sources/exp-rs-07-sheaves-v01-results.md; flip concept+analysis status; update focus.md.

blockers.description: Feynman corpus crawl still running (data-kuramoto/crawl.log). Last seen at 16:40 UTC with heavy 429s from unauthenticated S2 API. Stage B blocked until crawl finishes, analyze completes, and export succeeds.
blockers.workaround: Stage A complete. Set S2_API_KEY to drop 429 rate. Monitor: tail -f data-kuramoto/crawl.log. If crawl ended early (process died), re-run: cargo run --bin resyn -- crawl --source semanticscholar --paper-id <seed> --db surrealkv://./data-kuramoto --max-depth 2

human_actions_pending.action: Set S2_API_KEY env var (Semantic Scholar API key)
human_actions_pending.context: Unauthenticated crawl hits 429s and is slow (~2200ms/paper). Key brings it to ~400ms/paper. Non-blocking if crawl already finished.

decisions.decision: Dense np.linalg.eigh for N<=500, sparse eigsh for larger
decisions.rationale: eigsh(k=22) on N=24 with H⁰=22 only finds zero modes — misses non-zero modes entirely. Dense solver finds all N eigenvalues.

decisions.decision: COO accumulation for block-sparse Laplacian assembly
decisions.rationale: Handles multiple edges contributing to same diagonal block correctly (coo_matrix sums duplicates). lil_matrix block slice assignment is fragile.

decisions.decision: uv run --with numpy --with scipy python prototypes/sheaf_lbd_v01.py
decisions.rationale: numpy/scipy not installed system-wide; uv handles transient deps cleanly.

next_action: Check crawl status (tail data-kuramoto/crawl.log or ls -la data-kuramoto/). If done: (1) cargo run --bin resyn -- analyze --db surrealkv://./data-kuramoto, (2) export, (3) uv run ... python prototypes/sheaf_lbd_v01.py. Full run command in remaining_tasks[id=8].
